description_long: This muffin features a golden-brown, pleated wrapper that encases a soft, cake-like base. Atop the muffin sits a generous swirl of white frosting, arranged in three distinct, angular tiers that give it a geometric, layered appearance. The frosting is smooth and slightly matte, with subtle shading that suggests a creamy texture. There are no visible toppings, sprinkles, or decorative elements on the frosting, giving it a clean and minimalist look. The wrapper is a light beige color with gentle vertical ridges, typical of standard paper muffin liners. The muffin is shown isolated, with no visible plate or surface beneath it, appearing to float against a neutral background.
description: A golden-brown muffin in a pleated beige wrapper, topped with a smooth, tiered swirl of white frosting and no visible toppings or decorations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the muffin, with the frosting's angular tiers clearly visible and the wrapper's pleats prominent.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the left side of the muffin, with the frosting's layers and wrapper texture still clearly defined.
description_view_2: Rear view of the muffin, displaying the back of the frosting swirl and the even pleating of the wrapper.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, highlighting the symmetry of the frosting and the consistent wrapper pattern.
attribute_frosting_style: tiered swirl of smooth white frosting
